source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Rectangle $ ABCD$, pictured below, shares $50\%$ of its area with square $ EFGH$. Square $ EFGH$ shares $20\%$ of its area with rectangle $ ABCD$. What is $ \frac{AB}{AD}$?
<image1>

image_dependency: Question says "pictured below" and uses named geometric figures/overlap, so key spatial setup is likely in the image
multi_step: Requires combining two percentage-overlap statements across two shapes
Target asks for a side ratio `AB/AD`, so area relations likely must be translated into dimension relations
`should_push_multi_solution_agent`=true suggests stable nontrivial reasoning potential, though this is only supportive metadata
verifiability: Question is a well-specified geometry problem with a single explicit target ratio
`asset_registry_record.registry_passed`=true and image/text/answer assets are all present

decision_reasons: 题干、图像、答案均存在，核心语义资产完整
综合分较高，图像依赖性和可验证性都很强
虽然题目依赖图像且文字未完全刻画构型，但对应图像资产已提供，不构成候选池准入障碍
数值答案明确，适合后续验证与解题
